NTC OF MTN AND MTN FOR DEFT'S PETITION TO COMPEL BINDING ARBITRATION AND TO STAY PROCEEDINGS AND FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER AND APPENDIX OF NON-CALIFORNIA AUTHORITIES, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT STEPHENS INSTITUTE DBA ACADEMY OF ART UNIVERSITY HEARING SET FOR SEP-29-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT STEPHENS INSTITUTE'S PETITION TO COMPEL BINDING ARBITRATION AND TO STAY PROCEEDINGS AND FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER IS GRANTED IN PART. ARBITRATION IS COMPELLED TO THE EXTENT CLAIMS ARISE OUT THE INDEPENDENT CONTRACTOR AGREEMENT. THE ENTIRE CASE IS STAYED PENDING ARBITRATION. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. (301/PJB) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH; REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR #8189

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Deft'S Petition To Compel Binding Arbitration And To Stay Proceedings And For Protective Order And Appendix Of Non-California Authorities
Off Calendar Oct-20-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT STEPHENS INSTITUTE'S PETITION TO COMPEL BINDING ARBITRATION AND TO STAY PROCEEDINGS AND FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER. Appearances: Felipe R. Parker of Kumin Sommers LLP (434.4500) for plaintiff and opposing party. No other appearances. Plaintiff's request for a continuance of the matter to seek clarification is denied. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted in part. Arbitration is compelled to the extent claims arise out the independent contractor agreement. The entire case is stayed pending arbitration. Moving party to submit a proposed form of order. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Deft'S Petition To Compel Binding Arbitration And To Stay Proceedings And For Protective Order And Appendix Of Non-California Authorities

(301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189
